arguments.argument: As a strong defender of the core value of Justice/Equality/Freedom/Respect, I firmly believe that the primary goal should be to advance the overall understanding of quarterback development in the NFL. arguments.argument: On the other hand, providing full analysis (Action 2) would be in line with the values of freedom and respect.
